TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Nikapolongan_tadamaanay_ci_Huang_Zhaokai_piheratengay_a_lihay, title = Nikapolongan_tadamaanay_ci_Huang_Zhaokai_piheratengay_a_lihay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nikapolongan_tadamaanay_ci_Huang_Zhaokai_piheratengay_a_lihay} }

S.FORM: == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai piheratengay a lihay == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai mapatay i 6/15 piheratengay a lihay, congtong ci Lay Cingte citodong pipadongosan a kacingangan no kakeridan. 2024/06/05 13:41 (Singpon paratohay ci Hong roycin/Taynan ratoh ) Da'oc no 'orip mikinafalahay to saki nikapolongan no taywan a onto ci Huang Zhaokai o Kokomindayhiw ci Huang Zhaokai itini i 6/1 miliyas to hekal mapatay, kasa rekad no tamdaw ma'ilol to saki Taywan nikapolongan a ci mikinafalahay, mapapolong patireng to padongosay a wiyinhuy, nai congtong ci Lay Cingte citodongay malakakeridan, Taynansi siciw ci Huang Weizhe ci todong to midemakay kakeridan, mapolong midama to sakipadongos a demak. Saka pipadongios maketong i 6/9 midemak to mipatelian ato pitodohan, itiya o no Mincintang a fayfay ko sapi tahepo, roma romi'ad 6/15 midemak to pihiratengan a lihay, saka nga'ay no icowacowaay mapolong mihirateng ato padongos to nian pali'ayaway to saki Taywan nikapolongan a tamdaw. Ci Huang Zhaokai masofoc i 1942 mihecaan, o Taynansi a tamdaw, nano saka 2, 3 rekad a komindayhiw, 'ayaw mikihatiyaay to papotalay no tang ko demak, nai papotalay tang a piliyang, mincintang patireng tangasa Taywan nikapolongan syakay, mida'oc ko 'orip to saki kasa nikapolongan caay ka ci awaayay ningra mikihatiya. Ramasato, ci Huang Zhaokai nai 1980 mihecaan miteka misa'icel midipot to mafadesay i Militaw laloma'an, mipa'ayaw palowad to 228 demak a payakyak, itiya cingra i 1995 miheca patireng to katimolay radio dingtay, i katedalan katimolay sa'etal tadamaanay nikapolongan a piparatohan. Pasowal sa ko citodongay padongos kakeridan ci Huang Weizhe, nengnengen ko 'orip ni Huang Zhaokai, ano itira to i lalan, itira to i kasa'opan no kitakit ano eca i radio a kamok, oyaan to ko faloco' ningra to saki nikapolongan ko pisingting ko ni niyah a harateng, nai sa'ayaw tangasa anini caay ka falic, o sasowalen itini i rarakaten no Taywan ti saki nikapolongan o tadamaanay micikerohay ato palowaday a tamdaw, saki nian o tata'ongen cingra, nanay mapakahinom ko laloma'an ato citodongay padamaay, saka da'ocay to saki Taywan nikapolongan a misa'icelay ci Huang Zhaokai masawad to ningra ko karorayan a hakal minokay to i kakarayan, rihaday i ci Wamaan. Midotoc to pihalaka no citodongay a wiyinhuy, o pipatelian i takenip ci Huang Zhaokai itira i 6/9 herek no lahok 1:30 ko toki i Nanpin huayti cahong mihemak, paherek padongos i Taynansi pitodojan, ikor o mamida'oc mapateli i Taynansi Keristokiw tadem; roma i 6/15 itira i Taynansi "Hungyin wencuang ciwsing" midemak pihiratengan a lihay.
S.PHON: == nikapo~u删o~u艐an ta涩~僧amaanaj 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai pi魔蓹rat蓹艐aj a 删i魔aj == nikapo~u删o~u艐an ta涩~僧amaanaj 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai mapataj i */** pi魔蓹rat蓹艐aj a 删i魔aj, 师o~u艐to~u艐 师i 删aj 师i艐t蓹 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐 pipa涩~僧o~u艐o~usan a ka师i艐a艐an no~u kak蓹ri涩~僧an. ****/**/** **:** (si艐po~un parato~u魔aj 师i 魔o~u艐 ro~uj师in/tajnan rato~u魔 ) 涩~僧a省o~u师 no~u 省o~urip mikinafa删a魔aj to~u saki nikapo~u删o~u艐an no~u tajwan a o~unto~u 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai o~u ko~uko~umin涩~僧aj魔iw 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai itini i */* mi删ijas to~u 魔蓹ka删 mapataj, kasa r蓹ka涩~僧 no~u tam涩~僧aw ma省i删o~u删 to~u saki tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an a 师i mikinafa删a魔aj, mapapo~u删o~u艐 patir蓹艐 to~u pa涩~僧o~u艐o~usaj a wijin魔o~u~uj, nai 师o~u艐to~u艐 师i 删aj 师i艐t蓹 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj ma删akak蓹ri涩~僧an, tajnansi si师iw 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 w蓹i*魔蓹 师i to~u涩~僧o~u艐 to~u mi涩~僧蓹makaj kak蓹ri涩~僧an, mapo~u删o~u艐 mi涩~僧ama to~u sakipa涩~僧o~u艐o~us a 涩~僧蓹mak. saka pipa涩~僧o~u艐io~us mak蓹to~u艐 i */* mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u mipat蓹删ian ato~u pito~u涩~僧o~u魔an, itija o~u no~u min师inta艐 a fajfaj ko~u sapi ta魔蓹po~u, ro~uma ro~umi省a涩~僧 */** mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u pi魔irat蓹艐an a 删i魔aj, saka 艐a省aj no~u i师o~uwa师o~uwaaj mapo~u删o~u艐 mi魔irat蓹艐 ato~u pa涩~僧o~u艐o~us to~u nian pa删i省ajawaj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an a tam涩~僧aw. 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai maso~ufo~u师 i **** mi魔蓹师aan, o~u tajnansi a tam涩~僧aw, nano~u saka *, * r蓹ka涩~僧 a ko~umin涩~僧aj魔iw, 省ajaw miki魔atijaaj to~u papo~uta删aj no~u ta艐 ko~u 涩~僧蓹mak, nai papo~uta删aj ta艐 a pi删ija艐, min师inta艐 patir蓹艐 ta艐asa tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an sjakaj, mi涩~僧a省o~u师 ko~u 省o~urip to~u saki kasa nikapo~u删o~u艐an 师aaj ka 师i awaajaj ni艐ra miki魔atija. ramasato~u, 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai nai **** mi魔蓹师aan mit蓹ka misa省i师蓹删 mi涩~僧ipo~ut to~u mafa涩~僧蓹saj i mi删itaw 删a删o~uma省an, mipa省ajaw pa删o~uwa涩~僧 to~u *** 涩~僧蓹mak a pajakjak, itija 师i艐ra i **** mi魔蓹师a patir蓹艐 to~u katimo~u删aj ra涩~僧io~u 涩~僧i艐taj, i kat蓹涩~僧a删an katimo~u删aj sa省蓹ta删 ta涩~僧amaanaj nikapo~u删o~u艐an a piparato~u魔an. paso~uwa删 sa ko~u 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj pa涩~僧o~u艐o~us kak蓹ri涩~僧an 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 w蓹i*魔蓹, n蓹艐n蓹艐蓹n ko~u 省o~urip ni 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai, ano~u itira to~u i 删a删an, itira to~u i kasa省o~upan no~u kitakit ano~u 蓹师a i ra涩~僧io~u a kamo~uk, o~ujaan to~u ko~u fa删o~u师o~u省 ni艐ra to~u saki nikapo~u删o~u艐an ko~u pisi艐ti艐 ko~u ni nija魔 a 魔arat蓹艐, nai sa省ajaw ta艐asa anini 师aaj ka fa删i师, o~u saso~uwa删蓹n itini i rarakat蓹n no~u tajwan ti saki nikapo~u删o~u艐an o~u ta涩~僧amaanaj mi师ik蓹ro~u魔aj ato~u pa删o~uwa涩~僧aj a tam涩~僧aw, saki nian o~u tata省o~u艐蓹n 师i艐ra, nanaj mapaka魔ino~um ko~u 删a删o~uma省an ato~u 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj pa涩~僧amaaj, saka 涩~僧a省o~u师aj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an a misa省i师蓹删aj 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai masawa涩~僧 to~u ni艐ra ko~u karo~urajan a 魔aka删 mino~ukaj to~u i kakarajan, ri魔a涩~僧aj i 师i wamaan. mi涩~僧o~uto~u师 to~u pi魔a删aka no~u 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj a wijin魔o~u~uj, o~u pipat蓹删ian i tak蓹nip 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai itira i */* 魔蓹r蓹k no~u 删a魔o~uk *:** ko~u to~uki i nanpin 魔o~u~uajti 师a魔o~u艐 mi魔蓹mak, pa魔蓹r蓹k pa涩~僧o~u艐o~us i tajnansi pito~u涩~僧o~ujan, iko~ur o~u mami涩~僧a省o~u师 mapat蓹删i i tajnansi k蓹risto~ukiw ta涩~僧蓹m; ro~uma i */** itira i tajnansi "魔o~u~u艐jin w蓹n师o~u~ua艐 师iwsi艐" mi涩~僧蓹mak pi魔irat蓹艐an a 删i魔aj.
S.FORM: == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai piheratengay a lihay == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai mapatay i 6/15 piheratengay a lihay, congtong ci Lay Cingte citodong pipadongosan a kacingangan no kakeridan. 2024/06/05 13:41 (Singpon paratohay ci Hong roycin/Taynan ratoh ) Da'oc no 'orip mikinafalahay to saki nikapolongan no taywan a onto ci Huang Zhaokai o Kokomindayhiw ci Huang Zhaokai itini i 6/1 miliyas to hekal mapatay, kasa rekad no tamdaw ma'ilol to saki Taywan nikapolongan a ci mikinafalahay, mapapolong patireng to padongosay a wiyinhuy, nai congtong ci Lay Cingte citodongay malakakeridan, Taynansi siciw ci Huang Weizhe ci todong to midemakay kakeridan, mapolong midama to sakipadongos a demak. Saka pipadongios maketong i 6/9 midemak to mipatelian ato pitodohan, itiya o no Mincintang a fayfay ko sapi tahepo, roma romi'ad 6/15 midemak to pihiratengan a lihay, saka nga'ay no icowacowaay mapolong mihirateng ato padongos to nian pali'ayaway to saki Taywan nikapolongan a tamdaw. Ci Huang Zhaokai masofoc i 1942 mihecaan, o Taynansi a tamdaw, nano saka 2, 3 rekad a komindayhiw, 'ayaw mikihatiyaay to papotalay no tang ko demak, nai papotalay tang a piliyang, mincintang patireng tangasa Taywan nikapolongan syakay, mida'oc ko 'orip to saki kasa nikapolongan caay ka ci awaayay ningra mikihatiya. Ramasato, ci Huang Zhaokai nai 1980 mihecaan miteka misa'icel midipot to mafadesay i Militaw laloma'an, mipa'ayaw palowad to 228 demak a payakyak, itiya cingra i 1995 miheca patireng to katimolay radio dingtay, i katedalan katimolay sa'etal tadamaanay nikapolongan a piparatohan. Pasowal sa ko citodongay padongos kakeridan ci Huang Weizhe, nengnengen ko 'orip ni Huang Zhaokai, ano itira to i lalan, itira to i kasa'opan no kitakit ano eca i radio a kamok, oyaan to ko faloco' ningra to saki nikapolongan ko pisingting ko ni niyah a harateng, nai sa'ayaw tangasa anini caay ka falic, o sasowalen itini i rarakaten no Taywan ti saki nikapolongan o tadamaanay micikerohay ato palowaday a tamdaw, saki nian o tata'ongen cingra, nanay mapakahinom ko laloma'an ato citodongay padamaay, saka da'ocay to saki Taywan nikapolongan a misa'icelay ci Huang Zhaokai masawad to ningra ko karorayan a hakal minokay to i kakarayan, rihaday i ci Wamaan. Midotoc to pihalaka no citodongay a wiyinhuy, o pipatelian i takenip ci Huang Zhaokai itira i 6/9 herek no lahok 1:30 ko toki i Nanpin huayti cahong mihemak, paherek padongos i Taynansi pitodojan, ikor o mamida'oc mapateli i Taynansi Keristokiw tadem; roma i 6/15 itira i Taynansi "Hungyin wencuang ciwsing" midemak pihiratengan a lihay.

师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐 pipa涩~僧o~u艐o~usan a ka师i艐a艐an no~u kak蓹ri涩~僧an. ****/**/** **:** (si艐po~un parato~u魔aj 师i 魔o~u艐 ro~uj师in/tajnan rato~u魔 ) 涩~僧a省o~u师 no~u 省o~urip mikinafa删a魔aj to~u saki nikapo~u删o~u艐an no~u tajwan a o~unto~u 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai o~u ko~uko~umin涩~僧aj魔iw 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai itini i */* mi删ijas to~u 魔蓹ka删 mapataj, kasa r蓹ka涩~僧 no~u tam涩~僧aw ma省i删o~u删 to~u saki tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an a 师i mikinafa删a魔aj, mapapo~u删o~u艐 patir蓹艐 to~u pa涩~僧o~u艐o~usaj a wijin魔o~u~uj, nai 师o~u艐to~u艐 师i 删aj 师i艐t蓹 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj ma删akak蓹ri涩~僧an, tajnansi si师iw 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 w蓹i*魔蓹 师i to~u涩~僧o~u艐 to~u mi涩~僧蓹makaj kak蓹ri涩~僧an, mapo~u删o~u艐 mi涩~僧ama to~u sakipa涩~僧o~u艐o~us a 涩~僧蓹mak. saka pipa涩~僧o~u艐io~us mak蓹to~u艐 i */* mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u mipat蓹删ian ato~u pito~u涩~僧o~u魔an, itija o~u no~u min师inta艐 a fajfaj ko~u sapi ta魔蓹po~u, ro~uma ro~umi省a涩~僧 */** mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u pi魔irat蓹艐an a 删i魔aj, saka 艐a省aj no~u i师o~uwa师o~uwaaj mapo~u删o~u艐 mi魔irat蓹艐 ato~u pa涩~僧o~u艐o~us to~u nian pa删i省ajawaj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an a tam涩~僧aw. 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai maso~ufo~u师 i **** mi魔蓹师aan, o~u tajnansi a tam涩~僧aw, nano~u saka *, * r蓹ka涩~僧 a ko~umin涩~僧aj魔iw, 省ajaw miki魔atijaaj to~u papo~uta删aj no~u ta艐 ko~u 涩~僧蓹mak, nai papo~uta删aj ta艐 a pi删ija艐, min师inta艐 patir蓹艐 ta艐asa tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an sjakaj, mi涩~僧a省o~u师 ko~u 省o~urip to~u saki kasa nikapo~u删o~u艐an 师aaj ka 师i awaajaj ni艐ra miki魔atija. ramasato~u, 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai nai **** mi魔蓹师aan mit蓹ka misa省i师蓹删 mi涩~僧ipo~ut to~u mafa涩~僧蓹saj i mi删itaw 删a删o~uma省an, mipa省ajaw pa删o~uwa涩~僧 to~u *** 涩~僧蓹mak a pajakjak, itija 师i艐ra i **** mi魔蓹师a patir蓹艐 to~u katimo~u删aj ra涩~僧io~u 涩~僧i艐taj, i kat蓹涩~僧a删an katimo~u删aj sa省蓹ta删 ta涩~僧amaanaj nikapo~u删o~u艐an a piparato~u魔an. paso~uwa删 sa ko~u 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj pa涩~僧o~u艐o~us kak蓹ri涩~僧an 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 w蓹i*魔蓹, n蓹艐n蓹艐蓹n ko~u 省o~urip ni 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai, ano~u itira to~u i 删a删an, itira to~u i kasa省o~upan no~u kitakit ano~u 蓹师a i ra涩~僧io~u a kamo~uk, o~ujaan to~u ko~u fa删o~u师o~u省 ni艐ra to~u saki nikapo~u删o~u艐an ko~u pisi艐ti艐 ko~u ni nija魔 a 魔arat蓹艐, nai sa省ajaw ta艐asa anini 师aaj ka fa删i师, o~u saso~uwa删蓹n itini i rarakat蓹n no~u tajwan ti saki nikapo~u删o~u艐an o~u ta涩~僧amaanaj mi师ik蓹ro~u魔aj ato~u pa删o~uwa涩~僧aj a tam涩~僧aw, saki nian o~u tata省o~u艐蓹n 师i艐ra, nanaj mapaka魔ino~um ko~u 删a删o~uma省an ato~u 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj pa涩~僧amaaj, saka 涩~僧a省o~u师aj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~u删o~u艐an a misa省i师蓹删aj 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai masawa涩~僧 to~u ni艐ra ko~u karo~urajan a 魔aka删 mino~ukaj to~u i kakarajan, ri魔a涩~僧aj i 师i wamaan. mi涩~僧o~uto~u师 to~u pi魔a删aka no~u 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj a wijin魔o~u~uj, o~u pipat蓹删ian i tak蓹nip 师i 魔o~u~ua艐 *魔ao~ukai itira i */* 魔蓹r蓹k no~u 删a魔o~uk *:** ko~u to~uki i nanpin 魔o~u~uajti 师a魔o~u艐 mi魔蓹mak, pa魔蓹r蓹k pa涩~僧o~u艐o~us i tajnansi pito~u涩~僧o~ujan, iko~ur o~u mami涩~僧a省o~u师 mapat蓹删i i tajnansi k蓹risto~ukiw ta涩~僧蓹m; ro~uma i */** itira i tajnansi "魔o~u~u艐jin w蓹n师o~u~ua艐 师iwsi艐" mi涩~僧蓹mak pi魔irat蓹艐an a 删i魔aj.
